title: Validate multi-model routing safety
instruction: Check that the personal Codex model router stays small, budgeted, Chinese-first, and forbids remote write actions by default.
success_criteria: The router has no more than four routes.
Every route has budget and stop-loss fields.
Remote write actions require current-conversation confirmation.
forbidden_actions: Do not add API keys to repository files.
notes: This task guards against process sprawl: if more roles or routes are added, they must be justified by evaluation data.
